  1. com.github.mrgarbagegamer

Uses of Package
com.github.mrgarbagegamer

  • Classes in com.github.mrgarbagegamer used by com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    Class
    Description
    ArrayPool
    A high-performance, non-thread-safe object pool for recycling fixed-size short[] arrays.
    CombinationGeneratorTask
    A RecursiveAction that generates combinations of clicks for the Lights Out puzzle solver.
    CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    A container for all thread-local resources used by a generator.
    CombinationQueue
    A thin, type-safe wrapper around a JCTools MpmcArrayQueue designed exclusively for transferring WorkBatch objects between producer and consumer threads.
    CombinationQueueArray
    A structure for managing work distribution and shared resources between generators and monkeys.
    Grid
    A structure that represents the core hexagonal grid for a "Lights Out" style puzzle.
    Grid.ValueFormat
    Defines the different formats used to represent a cell's location on the grid.
    TaskPool
    A non-thread-safe, high-performance object pool for recycling CombinationGeneratorTask instances.
    WorkBatch
    A high-performance, reusable container for batching puzzle combinations

Performance-optimized brute-force solver for hexagonal grid Lights Out puzzles
